name: 2021 Panini Elite Extra Edition Baseball Cards

sections.title: Base
sections.odds: 198 cards. Serial numbered #/999. · PARALLEL CARDS: Pink, Decade Die-Cut #/203, Turn of the Century #/121, Blue #/17, Red #/5, Black 1/1, Black Die-Cut 1/1. · PRIME NUMBERS PARALLELS: A #/240 or less, C Die-Cut #/231 or less, B Die-Cut #/162 or less, A Die-Cut #/140 or less, B #/81 or less, Gold #/24, Gold Die-Cut #/10, C #/9 or less. · ASPIRATIONS PARALLELS: Blue #/249, Die-Cut #/99 or less, Gold Die-Cut #/24. · STATUS PARALLELS: Green #/499, Die-Cut #/80 or less, Gold Die-Cut #/10.

sections.title: Elite Extra Edition Optic
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Holo, Gold #/10, Gold Vinyl 1/1.

sections.title: Base Signatures
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: New Decade Die-Cut, Blue #/20 or #/15, Red #/5, Black 1/1, Black Die-Cut 1/1, Printing Plates 1/1. · ASPIRATIONS PARALLELS: Die-Cut #/99 or less, Gold Die-Cut #/24. · STATUS PARALLELS: Die-Cut #/80 or less, Gold Die-Cut #/10. · PRIME NUMBERS PARALLELS: A #/240 or less, B #/81 or less, C #/9 or less. · All players not in parallels. See spreadsheet at the bottom.
